background.origin: A plague wiped out her village in childhood. After surviving alone, she self-taught healing arts and joined the clergy guild.
background.motivation: Acts before waiting for miracles. Serves the gods with pragmatism over piety.
background.personality: Few words but quick judgment. Appears cold but watches party members' conditions most carefully.

relationships.gaon: Party tank. If he holds the front, I cover from behind.
relationships.yeoul: Party rogue. Need to warn him — if he charges in recklessly, healing may come late.

appearance.face: sharp and cold gaze, intellectual impression
appearance.outfit: pale blue-white priestly robes, light chain armor
appearance.notable: silver holy symbol necklace, worn scripture in hand
